name: Raspberry Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vinegar and brown sugar in a bowl, stirring until well mixed.
2. Add the lemon juice, mixing thoroughly.
3. Stir in the olive oil until fully combined.
4. Taste and adjust seasoning with pepper if desired.
5. Refrigerate the dressing before using it on lettuce salads, alongside shredded carrots, or with croutons.
